channel.display-name: Weird or What? With William Shatner
The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch
A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: Lars and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars Lindstrom is an akwardly shy young man in a small town who finally brings home the girl of his dreams to his brother and sister-in-law's home. The only problem is that she's not real - she's a sex doll.

programme.title: Out of the Furnace
programme.desc: When Rodney Baze mysteriously disappears and law enforcement doesn't follow through fast enough, his older brother Russell takes matters into his own hands to find justice.

programme.title: Terminal
programme.desc: In the dark heart of a sprawling, anonymous city, Terminal follows the twisting tales of two assassins carrying out a sinister mission (Max Irons & Dexter Fletcher), a teacher battling a fatal illness (Simon Pegg), an enigmatic janitor (Mike Myers)...

programme.title: Scoop
programme.desc: An American journalism student in London scoops a big story, and begins an affair with an aristocrat as the incident unfurls.

programme.title: Goodbye Lenin!
programme.desc: In 1990, to protect his fragile mother from a fatal shock after a long coma, a young man must keep her from learning that her beloved nation of East Germany as she knew it has disappeared.

programme.title: First Daughter
programme.desc: Samantha Mackenzie wants what every college freshman desires: to experience life away from home and parents. It's not going to be easy, however, because home for Sam is the White House, and her dad is the President of the United States.

programme.title: The Very Excellent Mr. Dundee
programme.desc: Paul Hogan, a retired actor who is constantly overshadowed by his character Crocodile Dundee, is reluctantly thrust back into the spotlight as he attempts to restore his sullied reputation on the eve of being awarded a knighthood by the Queen of England.

programme.title: Porno
programme.desc: Four repressed religious teens and a straight-edge projectionist working at a small-town movie theater in the 1990s discover a secret screening room filled with vintage exploitation films

programme.title: Playbirds
programme.desc: British sex-bomb, Mary Millington, stars as a policewoman who goes undercover to find out who is stalking and killing glamour models. Expect nothing to stay undercover for long in this raunchy British classic! Starring: Glynn Edwards, Gavin Campbell

programme.title: Diary of a Nudist
programme.desc: A reporter infiltrates a nudist camp for a story but finds herself embracing the lifestyle, challenging her own beliefs and societal expectations.

programme.title: The Island of Dr. Moreau
programme.desc: Grotesque sci-fi horror about genetic experimentation.

programme.title: Three Graves for a Winchester
programme.desc: Three Graves for a Winchester (1966) is a Spaghetti Western about two former friends torn apart by love and war. Years after the Civil War, a sheriff must face his old ally—now an outlaw—to save his family and restore justice.

programme.title: A Sky Full of Stars for a Roof
programme.desc: Two drifters meet and soon become travelling companions. But one of them, Tim (Gemma), is being chased by a crazed killer and his band of gunmen to settle an old score.

programme.title: Ballad of Death Valley: Ballad of Death Valley
programme.desc: An 'angel-faced' gunfighter is tasked with infiltrating a ranch overrun by Mexican bandits and saving their hostages, including the fiancée of the local sheriff.

programme.title: Geronimo
programme.desc: In 1883, Geronimo and his small group of Apache warriors, under constant attack from both U.S. and Mexican military forces, reluctantly surrender in exchange for food and land. But promises are broken, and the Apaches declare all-out war on the U.S.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Ex-soldier Joseph Smith comes home from war but has been left disturbed by his experiences. Despite his intentions to start a new life, he becomes caught up in the criminal underworld, where he plots revenge on his friend's killer.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter (Vin Diesel) is all that stands between humanity and the combined forces of the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Ambushed
programme.desc: An agent (Dolph Lundgren) faces killers and crooked cops as he tries to rescue an undercover colleague (Carly Pope) from cocaine smugglers.

programme.title: Redirected
programme.desc: Starring Hollywood hard man Vinnie Jones, "Redirected" follows four friends turned first-time robbers who accidentally get stranded in a middle-of-nowhere Eastern European country.

programme.title: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: A psycho-killer stalks two New York City women--one a frustrated housewife, the other a street-smart hooker who teams up with the first woman's son to trap the murderer. The film reaches a shocking climax when the slayer's real identity is revealed.

programme.title: No Way Home
programme.desc: A paroled murderer returns to the Staten Island home of his youth, where a poignant friendship blossoms with the restrained wife of his temperamental-- and jealous-- brother.

programme.title: Wicked Ways
programme.desc: A wife, her two-timing husband and a flirting neighbor are unpredictable competitors in a warped game that turns into a life-or-death affair.

programme.title: Narcopolis
programme.desc: In the near future, Frank Grieves is a new breed of police officer working in a city where all recreational drugs are legal. When he is taken off a case involving an unidentified corpse, he discovers that legalization has come at a price.

programme.title: Alien Reign Of Man
programme.desc: Stranded on a distant planet, a team must fight aliens and activate a machine meant to restore Earth to a time before its downfall.

programme.title: Frank Herbert's Dune: Episode 1
programme.desc: On order of the emperor, Duke Leto Atreides moves his family from his home planet Caladan to another planet, Arrakis, also known as Dune. After an attack on their stronghold, his son Paul and his concubine flee into the desert.

programme.title: Perfect
programme.desc: Executive produced by Steven Soderbergh, PERFECT is a BLACK MIRROR-esque slice of twisted science fiction.

programme.title: A.R.C.H.I.E: A.R.C.H.I.E
programme.desc: Isabel has recently lost her parents in a car accident. Feeling alone and friendless, she befriends a stray robot dog named A.R.C.H.I.E. who can talk, run at blinding speed and has super strength and x-ray vision and they become fast friends.

programme.title: The Chaperone
programme.desc: Ray’s been asked to chaperone a school trip with his daughter Sally’s class. When characters from Ray’s criminal past believe he stole the loot from a bank they robbed, Ray will do whatever it takes to keep his daughter and her class out of harms way.

programme.title: The Adventures of Greyfriars Bobby
programme.desc: Bobby, a brave Skye Terrier, becomes a local legend when he refuses to leave his master's grave after he dies. Based on true events.

programme.title: Jail: Child of God
programme.desc: One man booked for intoxication is placed in a sobering cell for being uncooperative. An aggrieved woman claims Animal Control took her "baby". A man tells officers he is a "child of God" and actor.

programme.title: Jail: Phone Fight
programme.desc: An inmate refuses to be handcuffed while officers seek to search his cell for contraband. A man tells deputies he is known as "Baby Boy" amongst the ladies. Fights erupt during prison phone time.

programme.title: Jail: Fearless
programme.desc: Toting his guitar, an inmate serenades the officers. One man protests his arrest and states that having cocaine is not a crime. A man claims to be an Iraqi War Veteran and challenges his detainment.

programme.title: Jail: Running Wild
programme.desc: A disorderly man shouts to the heavens and asks for divine intervention. Twin brothers are arrested after a fray with police. A man in women's clothing is booked after harassing passengers on a bus.

programme.title: Jail: Party's Over
programme.desc: In San Diego, CA an officer grapples with a combative detainee. In Portland, OR six party goers are taken into custody. In Fort Worth, TX a high-risk inmate manages to get the key to his handcuffs.

programme.title: Jail: Hat Thief
programme.desc: Headbutts and aggression abound during a jail fight. A young man is arrested after stealing $1,500 worth of hats. Officers discover a suicidal inmate who’s no longer taking his medication.

programme.title: Jail: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Deputies assist arresting officers by removing an angry man from their patrol car. Violent outbursts plague an arrest. One woman struggles with bail. Three drunk men become wildly emotional.

programme.title: Jail: Hysterical Earring
programme.desc: A man is arrested at a popular theme park for public intoxication. A detainee swallows his earring during processing. Officers attempt to restrain a combative woman in custody.

programme.title: Jail: Ultimate Fighter
programme.desc: An angry inmate refuses to change clothes. A man in violation of his parole is stopped by officers for attempting to hitchhike. Two men claim they were beaten by their girlfriends.

programme.title: Jail: International Police
programme.desc: An angry man refuses to cooperate during the booking process. A man claims to be part of the "international police".

programme.title: Jail: Hopeless Hooker
programme.desc: An uncooperative woman is placed in a restraint chair. A troubled woman with a drug addiction is brought in on prostitution charges. One man is taken to a sobering cell to sleep off his intoxication.

programme.title: Let Me In
programme.desc: A bullied young boy befriends a young female vampire who lives in secrecy with her guardian. Starring: Kodi Smit-McPhee, Chloë Grace Moretz, Richard Jenkins

programme.title: Triangle
programme.desc: A group of friends suffer a yachting accident and take refuge on a cruise drifting on the open sea, but quickly realize they were better off on the upturned yacht. Starring: Liam Hemsworth, Melissa George, Bryan Probets, Michael Dorman, Joshua McIvor.

programme.title: When the Lights Went Out
programme.desc: The terrifying true story of one of Britain’s most haunted houses. A young family’s dream home soon descends into a panic-stricken nightmare when they find they are being terrorised by a violent poltergeist.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Robbins turns detective to solve the mysterious deaths of four apparently unrelated deaths

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to the murder of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs attempt to solve a string of murders connected to a cache of stolen casino chips.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Feature length. The CSIs attempt to solve a string of murders.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Feature-length crime drama. After a PI is shot dead, Warrick goes from suspect to target.

programme.title: Scorpion: Scorp Family Robinson
programme.desc: Three weeks after they crash land on a deserted island, tensions run high for Team Scorpion when they must battle to overcome their relationship obstacles with each other in order to be rescued.

programme.title: Scorpion: Extinction
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with their old nemesis Mark Collins in order to prevent the extinction of mankind. Also, Walter and Paige awkwardly navigate their new relationship. Josh Leonard guest stars.

programme.title: Scorpion: More Extinction
programme.desc: Team Scorpion continues to work with their nemesis, Mark Collins, in order to prevent an extinction event that could end humanity. Also, Cabe's last-minute decision while on the case leads to the possible end of his career.

programme.title: Scorpion: Grow a Deer, A Female Deer
programme.desc: When poachers almost kill a pregnant endangered deer, Team Scorpion recreates the animal's womb to try to save it and its baby's life. Also, Happy and Toby discuss the future of their family.

programme.title: Scorpion: Nuke Kids on the Block
programme.desc: While decommissioning an old nuclear missile, a simple accident causes Team Scorpion to endure exposure to toxic vapor while trying to prevent the nuke from detonating.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sci Hard
programme.desc: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: Andy heads out with a very-pregnant Marlo to find a volatile woman who’s gone missing after group therapy, but neither Andy nor Marlo are prepared when Marlo suddenly goes into labor.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived (Ep. 520), it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment. So when Juliet offers Andy an opportunity to leave town for 4 months on an undercover project, Andy starts to consider it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: Andy and Sam’s wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah. But when Andy is taken off-course by a hitchhiker and then stranded on the side of a dead-end road with a dying man, she finds herself with no way to get help

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fresh Paint
programme.desc: Andy McNally’s first shift on the job turns into mayhem when shots are fired in a downtown rooming house. In the midst of the chaos, Andy triumphantly makes her first big arrest

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Mercury Retrograde
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt down a dangerous escaped convict, Swarek drags Andy through his undercover hauntson a mission he won’t explain. At first, Andy assumes Swarek is a rogue cop trying to settle scores from his undercover days.

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: Blamed for the murder of his girlfriend, a man (Daniel Radcliffe) awakes one morning to find he has grown a pair of horns. Armed, now, with supernatural powers, he sets out to find the killer.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Legendary half-demon Hellboy encounters an ancient resurrected sorceress who's out to avenge a past betrayal. Caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy becomes hell-bent on stopping her without triggering the end of the world.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The fate of the human race hangs in the balance when the Witch Queen rises from the dead, seeking revenge against Kaulder, the immortal warrior who slayed her centuries ago.

programme.title: Yield to the Night
programme.desc: A young woman who has been abused and taken advantage of by all the men in her life, finally finds a man she believes truly loves her. However, she snaps when she finds out that he too is cheating on her.

programme.title: Eight O'Clock Walk
programme.desc: Young, inexperienced lawyer Peter Tanner must defend a cab driver who is accused of murdering a young girl, but complications arise when the prosecuting lawyer is Peter's own father.

programme.title: Hunted
programme.desc: An unusual relationship develops between a fugitive killer and a runaway orphan on an odyssey across England.

programme.title: Curse of The Ancients
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts reveals how archaeologists unveil one of history's most mysterious periods. After Rome's collapse, Saxons and Vikings rampaged through Europe, but then these pagan societies seemed to disappear. Where did they go? And why?

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands: Episode 3
programme.desc: Set sail for Rathlin Island as we explore a Neolithic stone tool factory, a unique upside-down lighthouse and a World War II shipwreck.

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands: Episode 4
programme.desc: Venture to England's South Coast, as we dive with sharks, explore the battlements of Drake's Island, uncover the origins of Scouts, and discover fossils on the Isle of Wight.

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Regency Cheltenham: Alice studies the history of Cheltenham, Britain's most Regency town. She attends a period society ball, investigates the rigid social hierarchy and more.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure takes us to India at the time of the Mughal Empire and a jewel that is linked to centuries of greed and bloodshed.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure takes us to the Bay of Naples and the doomed Roman city of Pompeii, where items stolen by tourists have created misery and misfortune.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: Following the attack on his precinct, Kane buries his friends and sets his sights on avenging their deaths. He assembles a new team and follows the trail across the border to Vancouver.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: Now in Vancouver, Kane joins forces with the CIA to take down a lawyer who had a hand in the attack on Kane’s precinct. The CIA wants the lawyer dead, and promises it will bring Kane one step closer to the man responsible for it all: The Ghost.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: The CIA asks Kane and his team to take down a high-level gang boss involved in human smuggling, but Kane’s investigation uncovers a larger conspiracy involving organ-trafficking.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Kessler must protect his ex-wife’s lover from a deadly Mexican drug cartel.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: When CSIS sends a suspect to Syria to be tortured the elite ICS Squad must race to prove him innocent.

programme.title: Siren's Kiss
programme.desc: A painter has serious creative block. He decides that two nude models living in his house might help. His wife objects, or does she?

programme.title: The Art of Love
programme.desc: In imperial Rome, the noblewoman Claudia puts into practice the lessons of the poet Ovid on the art of love.

programme.title: The Pleasure
programme.desc: Leonora's children Ursula and Edmund inherit her erotic recordings. Ursula uses the recordings to forge a relationship with Gerard, Leonora's late lover. Meanwhile, Gerard's mistress attends to Edmund.

programme.title: Confessions from the David Galaxy Affair
programme.desc: Twin British sex-bombs Mary Millington and Rosemary England take on an astrologer who can bed women as easily as he can read fortunes! No-one goes home a Virgo - and Diana Dors adds to the glam!

programme.title: JAG: Tiger, Tiger
programme.desc: Harm takes Josh on a weekend cruise for Navy families aboard a frigate. When the frigate is taken over by terrorists who intend to fire missiles at Cuba, Harm and Bud take matters into their own hands to stop the evil plot.

programme.title: JAG: Return of Mimmy Blackhorse
programme.desc: An Army forensic pathologist joins forces with Harm, Mac, Bud and Harriet as they try to verify that newly unearthed human remains are those of a heroic Navajo "code-talker" who had been missing since WWII.

programme.title: JAG: The Imposter
programme.desc: Harm is held captive by Palmer, a renegade government agent with whom he had crossed swords a few months ago. While Palmer prepares a life mask so he can pass for Harm, he explains his plans to assassinate the key witness in the trial.

programme.title: JAG: To Russia With Love
programme.desc: With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: JAG: Gypsy Eyes
programme.desc: Unable to lose the pursuing Russian fighters, Harm's and Mac’s hijacked Mig is shot out of the sky over Siberia.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Parker is lured into a trap and confronted with a deadly choice: reveal a dark secret from his past or lose his life.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A vigilante, out for blood, goes too far when he takes the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A shooter inside a historic arena leaves Sam questioning his place on the team.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A wave of terrorist bombs shuts down the city, pushing Team One to the limit and putting one of their own on the line.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU must rescue a young woman after she’s been abducted by a delusional man who insists she is his missing daughter.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: 'Emotion Option'; 'Film & Theater Styles'; 'Letter Changes'; 'March'; 'Props'; 'Helping Hands'; 'Party Quirks'.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Rory Bremner, Stephen Frost, Stephen Fry, Josie Lawrence, Michael McShane, Colin Mochrie, Greg Proops and more.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Joined by guest performer Keegan Michael Key, the team recreate a colourful family reunion speaking only in questions, commentate on sexy bodies and suggest unlikely lines from Bond films. (S3, E04)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: 'Film & Theater Styles'; 'News Report'; 'Translation'; 'Props'; 'Helping Hands'; 'Party Quirks'; 'March.'

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha hosts another unforgettable special, featuring some questionable rapping skills in "Get Down," and the cast crooning through a smooth song about rowing in "Lounge Lizards". (S12, E08)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: In a show filled with stand out moments, Gary and Wayne serenade star guests Penn & Teller in Motown style before the duo leave Ryan tied in knots in a magical Helping Hands. (S3, E01)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Film & Theater Styles, Questions Only, Bar Scene, Scene to Music, Whose Line, World's Worst, Props, Narrate.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: TV & film star Alyson Hannigan joins for a date at a restaurant where everyone is a famous cartoon character. Gary has a tough choice in "Dating App", featuring a series of evil Ryan's. (S13, E03)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Questions Only, Sound Effects, Sit, Stand, Bend, Weird Newscasters, Home Shopping, Animals.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Questions Only, Film & Theater Styles, Sound Effects, World's Worst, Props, Whose Line, Newsflash, Superheroes.

programme.title: Matlock: The Suspect (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock comes to the aid of a young socialite accused of murdering her older husband for money.

programme.title: Matlock: The Defense
programme.desc: After witnessing a violent argument between his parents, a distraught young man murders his abusive father.

programme.title: Matlock: The Game Show
programme.desc: Matlock comes to the defense of popular game show host Dennis Blake who’s accused of the murder of his successful, yet despised mega-millionaire producer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Foursome
programme.desc: A brash multimillionaire, Ellis Blake is held in the slaying of Jeffrey Holden, a handsome, young man who intended to marry Ellis’ daughter – without his blessing or consent.

programme.title: Matlock: The Outcast (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock’s faith in his ability as a top-notch attorney is completely eroded when he’s dismissed by a client and replaced by a younger lawyer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Outcast (Part 2)
programme.desc: During his fishing trip, Matlock encounters the small, unfriendly town of Lone Pine as he attempts to solve the mysterious death of a young farmhand and uncover a town-wide coverup.

programme.title: A Future on Stage: The Making of a Broadway Musical
programme.desc: In A Future on Stage: The Making of a Broadway Musical, the creators of Back to the Future fight to bring their beloved franchise to the stage.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: Bob Kane and Bill Finger’s costumed hero leaped off the page and onto the screen in 1966, but it wasn’t the dark detective fans anticipated.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: With an injured star, a troublesome vehicle, and an unyielding suit production is off to a rocky start. Can the producers and director work out their differences to land this dark superhero film? Or will disputes over the ending drop them all off a tower?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: After the success of Batman 89, the studio was ready for round two, but their director was not. Given free reign, Burton and his handpicked team went wild. But would his dark vision scare away their target audience?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: A new director brings his own colorful aesthetic, but who is really in charge? A fraught production drives away his star yet delivers the toy friendly Batman the studio wanted. But when the sequel goes over the top, the franchise hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Batman
programme.desc: To revive a dying franchise, the studio gives the keys to the Batmobile to an indie director whose origin story and grounded aesthetic promised to resuscitate their hero.

programme.title: Breathe In
programme.desc: When a foreign exchange student arrives in a small upstate New York town, she challenges the dynamics of her host family's relationships and alters their lives forever.

programme.title: Play
programme.desc: An astute observation based on real cases of bullying. In central Gothenburg, Sweden, a group of boys, aged 12-14, robbed other children on about 40 occasions between 2006 and 2008.

programme.title: The Square
programme.desc: Christian's next art installation \\"The Square\\", invites passersby to altruism. The museum's PR agency has created an unexpected campaign for \\"The Square\\". The response is overblown and sends Christian and the museum, into an existential crisis.

programme.title: Ice
programme.desc: Jake and Freddy smuggle Lady Rah’s diamonds into Vancouver, but things don’t go as planned. Cam and Isaac butt heads over the direction Green & Green is taking. New evidence comes to light in the Avi Kreshman case.

programme.title: A House Divided: Heaven's Lieutenants
programme.desc: Cam Jr. spirals, police close in on the family.

programme.title: A House Divided: Just Like You
programme.desc: Carissa makes a risky move and Brittany forms an alliance.

programme.title: A House Divided: Hide No More
programme.desc: An old flame tempts Cam Jr. Carissa's ex-lover.

programme.title: A House Divided: That Woman
programme.desc: Law enforcement close in on the Sanders banking operation.

programme.title: A House Divided: Where the Bodies are Buried
programme.desc: Cam Jr. learns the truth about his mother's death.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: A scientist from the original Commonwealth shows up, caught in a time loop.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Flavin returns, sparking a gang war, and helps Dylan develop as a Paradine.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: A crystal that can restore the Andromeda's power is discovered, but in order to get it, Dylan must work for the mine's owner.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Tunnels are discovered on Seefra which can be used to reach eight other Seefra planets.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: When an old man is killed, Beka, Rhade and Harper are the main suspects and stand trial.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Rhade leads the rebels in battle against a warlord on Seefra-5.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Du Plessis has started a one man campaign of vandalism against the new neighbours at Mara; Peeters and the mining company. When Peeters catches him on CCTV, Du Plessis is fined and given a restraining order to keep him away from Mara.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Du Plessis comes to meet Caroline's plane but he doesn't seem happy – he has seen that the mining company have already started building the road which threatens Leopard's Den.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: The family are making arrangements to leave Leopard's Den, all except Du Plessis who is steadfastly refusing to accept that he has lost his home. He won't use his share of the money from the sale of the land to buy somewhere else.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: The family have been squatting at Leopard's Den as they prepare to make their last stand to prevent the bulldozers from destroying their home. Du Plessis and Fatani bring elephants and a giraffe to dissuade the construction crew from moving in.

programme.title: Wild At Heart
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of Leopard's Den, the family are split across continents. Caroline, Liv and a heavily pregnant Alice are in the UK, while Danny and Du Plessis have remained in South Africa.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Player
programme.desc: Bob attends a personal finance seminar to help him get his hopeless financial house in order.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Getaway
programme.desc: Margaret is nominated for the Golden Arch Support award for outstanding service in the field of footcare.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Mummy's Boy
programme.desc: Bobs mother is coming all the way from England to visit him.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gone to Seed
programme.desc: Bob decides to donate his sperm to a local sperm bank.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Candidate
programme.desc: Margaret finds herself inadvertently running for City Council when the candidate she is supporting drops out of the race.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Life Saver
programme.desc: Bob inadvertently saves the life of a suicidal man who then decides to become Bob's best friend.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: I, Bob
programme.desc: When an efficiency expert comes to assess the Inner City Dental Clinic, Bob gets side shifted out of a job.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Mastermind
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret have a fender-bender with a local mobster, they accidentally turn him into the police.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Outward Bound
programme.desc: Bob joins his male colleagues on a canoe trip to a provincial park.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: After escaping a DUI charge by leaping over a bridge, Percy is captured by a pair of stew-lovers who fish him out of the river.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: After Percy photocopies Kevin's diary and posts it around the neighborhood, Kevin is bullied out of town.

programme.title: Dark Matter
programme.desc: After losing one of their own, the crew must race against time to retake the ship.

programme.title: Dark Matter

programme.desc: In 2007, Meredith Kercher is murdered in Italy. Amanda Knox and Raffaele Sollecito are initially convicted but later exonerated. Rudy Guede is convicted. The Kercher family still seeks justice.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Counterfeiter
programme.desc: Destroying a drug ring is the task of the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Town

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Killing
programme.desc: The IMF sets out to destroy a murder-for-hire organization.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Phoenix

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Recovery
programme.desc: The IMF takes the task of recovering a secret fail-safe device.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to a Hollywood auction and face a new competitor with a seemingly endless cash flow. After they uncover a triple barrel shotgun and an antique camel saddle, Allen confronts an old childhood fear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Without a Chute
programme.desc: After a tough auction, things get worse when the shop's landlord wants to talk to the guys. Ton tries to negotiate with him while Allen has to put an experimental powered parachute to the test to save the day's profits.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cashville, Tennessee
programme.desc: Ton and Allen hit the road for Nashville, where they rumble with a band of tough, high-bidding bikers. The day explodes when the guys discover a 37 millimeter anti-tank gun and a cowboy's rodeo saddle.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carolyn Goes Topless
programme.desc: A friendly competition with former employee Carolyn turns into a vicious battle for a 1968 Corvette Stingray, giving Carolyn the last laugh. Allen tests his Ninja skills with an antique sickle weapon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust
programme.desc: Ton and Allen race back from an auction to purchase a rare comic valued at over $100,000. The guys uncover a Samurai sword used for ritual suicide and Allen lives out his childhood fantasy of becoming knight.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gone in 20 Seconds
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get taken down by their fiercest opponent, CJ, but a twist of fate keeps the guys in the game. They uncover a Geiger counter and NASCAR impact wrenches, while their accountant delivers some shocking news.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.desc: Avoiding jetlag; a demonstration of the size of the solar system; square-wheeled motorbike.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage

programme.title: How to Colonize the Stars

programme.title: Wild Asia: At The Edge

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The family size has dwindled leaving the Whiskers the weakest they have been for a very long time.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Ice Man

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Trouble in Paradise

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Girl Power

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Prodigal Son
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Ties
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Special Delivery

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Surface Scratches
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Great Debate
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Governor's Travels

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack and Gown

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hands on a Woodchipper

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: De-Bug Life

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Men vs. Wild

programme.desc: When Phil discovers more beaver activity on the Robertson land, he recruits Jase, Jep, and Si to get rid of them. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie bring Bella to her first day of karate practice.

programme.desc: Stumped on a way to celebrate Willie's birthday, Korie enlists the guys' help and Jase takes the reigns in planning a trip to the lake where Phil and Kay used to live. Meanwhile, the women realize a raccoon is inside the lake house.

programme.title: Battle of Britain - Empty Skies
programme.desc: Tells the story of 19 men and women who were there. Through a series of filmed interviews their stories have been preserved, allowing them to tell the part they played in the nation's defence in their own words creating a unique collection of accounts.

programme.title: Blitz the Aftermath

programme.title: The Blitz
programme.desc: The Blitz looks at the build-up to the raids and detailed footage of the destruction that followed. It features interviews from those who lived through it and stories of sadness and bravery, at a time when Britain held strong and swore not to surrender.

programme.title: VE Day - Forever in their Debt

programme.title: Arthur: Follow the Bouncing Ball/Buster Baxter and the Letter from the Sea
programme.desc: Alberto Molina's beloved soccer ball--signed by his favorite Ecuadorian soccer star --is lost! While on vacation, Buster discovers a message in a bottle on the shore. Could it be a message from the people of the lost city of Atlantis?

programme.title: Arthur: Show Off/Dog's Best Friend
programme.desc: It's the Elwood City dog show and Killer is facing off against Sebastian Winkleplotz, the snooty, championship-winning poodle. Arthur agrees to watch Amigo while Alberto's off at camp, but Pal gets worried.

programme.title: Arthur: Mr. Ratburn's Secret Identity/Besties
programme.desc: Mysterious calls. Superhuman strength. Is Mr. Ratburn secretly a superhero? When Buster and Ladonna bond over a memorable trip to the movies, Arthur feels left out. Has Ladonna taken his place as Buster's best bud?

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Goes To Washington/Arthur's Mystery Envelope
programme.desc: D.W.'s on her way to Washington and she's bored by it all until she gets lost during a tour of the White House. Then, when Mr. Haney gives Arthur a sealed envelope to bring home to Mom, Arthur fears the worst.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. All Wet/Buster's Dino Dilemma
programme.desc: The Reads are having a wonderful time at the beach, except for D.W. who simply refuses to have fun. Next, Buster and Arthur make a long-awaited field trip to a dinosaur excavation.

programme.title: Arthur: Grandma Thora Appreciation Day/Fern's Slumber Party
programme.desc: Arthur and D.W. are planning a surprise party for Grandma Thora. But amidst the party-planning mayhem, they forget about the guest of honor! Then, shy Fern hosts a slumber party at her mother's urging.

programme.title: Arthur: Making Conversation/A Cloudy Day
programme.desc: Talking to adults makes George want to hide! When he learns he must go to a grown-up party, he turns to his friends for help. Then, Arthur and his friends learn that old silent films can be just as much fun as the movies they’re used to.

programme.title: Arthur: Pick a Car, Any Car/Jenna's Bedtime Blues
programme.desc: The family car is broken, and so is Arthur's heart. How can Mom and Dad even think of replacing it? It’s Muffy's annual slumber party, and Jenna is finally invited! But what if the other girls discover that she's an occasional bed-wetter?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Back/The Ballad Of Buster Baxter
programme.desc: Buster's coming home! The word spreads fast, but so does the fear that Buster will be different. Then, it seems to Buster, not only have his friends changed while he was gone, but they've forgotten all about him! Will he ever fit in again?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Mother Goose - Fun With Reading
programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that "The Land of Mother Goose" truly exists. Several Mother Goose characters have come to ask for help! Parts of their rhymes are missing! When Mother Goose arrives, she fixes the problem.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Today is the big dance party in the park. Barney tells Baby Bop the story of “The Princess Without a Song to Sing.”

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shreeka's Revenge

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Nightmare in the Lair

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings throw a surprise birthday party for one of the clan. When Happy Birthday rings out, the surprise is as great for Grizzy, who is trying to take a nap after a hearty meal, as it is for the birthday Lemming hero in question.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: A gust of wind sweeps away the flower that Grizzly's adored she-bear wears in her hair. Grizzly sees this as a golden opportunity to dazzle her by bringing it back.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds two identical vases that are actually communicating vessels in a Native American Indian chest. If he sticks his hand in one, it comes out the other, regardless of the distance between them.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a vintage stopwatch in the garage which lets one wind back the minute that has just passed by, and it can even stop time and movement in one's surroundings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is disturbed in the middle of his TV snack by a flow of incongruous objects that have been transformed into hot-air balloons.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers with great delight that the ranger has purchased a brand new multi-function Stressless recliner. But the Lemmings transform it into a fearsome multi-game chair.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings play kite surf with a homemade kite. Grizzly notices that the she-bear he's in love with watches the kite perform arabesques in the sky with admiration.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy snatches the last jar of chocolate spread out from under the noses of the Lemmings. In exchange, he offers them the toy stuck inside the lid, a mini-flute.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings play a new game, floating like flags in the breeze from the fan set on maximum. But Grizzy quickly rids the living room of this interference.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have a grand old time tearing down their Kapla block buildings, which they rebuild just as fast. Grizzly remarks that the she-bear he's in love with is impressed by the Lemmings' construction and makes believe that it's his work of art.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings draw inspiration from lessons they find in a martial arts book and start breaking every wooden object they can get their hands on into two. When Grizzy tries to stop them, they go on to the next lesson and get him in a judo hold.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy dreams that he's a valiant knight who has delivered his beloved. As he is about to take her in his arms, he is woken by the Lemmings who have chosen this day to blast music.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy stands in front of the pantry, desperate. The stock of chocolate spread is completely depleted. He realises that the Lemmings are making some themselves, following a complicated recipe.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Inspired by a magazine with a jewellery ad showing a man offering a diamond to a woman, Grizzy imagines himself offering the ranger's engagement ring to his beloved she-bear.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he accidentally sticks a computer microprocessor to his temple, Grizzy is transformed into an exceptionally intelligent being capable of predicting events to come far in advance.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings prepare a dream afternoon snack with the last jar of chocolate spread in the cupboard. Tough luck, Grizzy is coming. Caught off guard, the Lemmings hide the jar in a teddy bear-pyjama case to slip away without arousing suspicion.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy gleefully discovers that he can print images taken with the ranger's camera as it's connected to a state-of-the-art printer. He decides to frame himself, but when the time comes to print his portrait, there's no more paper in the printer.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: A van pulls up to the ranger's cabin to deliver a full crate of jars of chocolate spread. While Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over a wrecking bar to open it, someone steals the crate.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: As usual, Grizzly picks the door of the Ranger's log cabin to come in and make himself comfortable, but this time it's impossible to enter. The Lemmings have requisitioned the cabin for a party and barricaded themselves inside.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have got their hands on some white beans which have very strange properties, when mixed with soda anyone who eats them turns into a bouncing ball. Grizzy realises that if he wants to have a nap, he must get rid of the magic beans.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly wants to get rid of the old piano in the garage at any cost, for the Lemmings love using it to make a dissonant racket. But when he notices a she-bear he's in love with likes the melody of Fur Elise, he decides to learn the piece.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings inherit a crate that fell off a Canadian army convoy transporting ultra-secret material. The case inside the crate emits a sort of laser beam that divides objects into multiple miniaturised versions of themselves.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Near the supermarket, a machine hands out surprise eggs in exchange for a coin. Amongst the lots to be won, there is a super firework rocket the Lemmings dream of.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: At the Ranger's home, Grizzy finds a high-tech gadget that enables you to learn anything within seconds thanks to electrodes hooked to the brain, meaning that he can become the perfect bear.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Ash and friends are on a plane back to Olivine City when they get caught in a terrible storm that also sweeps up Team Rocket’s balloon! They’ll have to work together to land safely…but can they manage it?

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: After several interruptions, including yet another Team Rocket scheme, Ash’s battle against Jasmine at the Olivine Gym is finally getting under way!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When the Pokémon at Professor Oak's lab in Kanto have a hard time getting along, the professor asks Ash to send his Bulbasaur to the lab so it can help keep the peace.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: In Ecruteak City, our heroes meet up with their friend Sakura and her newly evolved Espeon. Sakura and her sisters are preparing for a dance competition, but Team Rocket is lurking in the wings, hoping to steal their Pokémon…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When our heroes investigate a sudden pealing of bells, they discover that the Crystal Bells, which are said to ring only when the Legendary Pokémon Ho-Oh returns, are missing! The researcher Eusine seems to know something…

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When Ash runs into his old rival Gary preparing to enter his Arcanine in a race, he decides to compete as well! But first, he’ll have to chase Team Rocket away from the Pokémon Day Care.

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When the Pokémon Egg given to Ash goes missing, our heroes call on the help of a hapless Officer Jenny. It isn't long before they realize that if they want the Egg back, they'll have to find it themselves!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: The moment has finally come: a Phanpy has hatched from Ash's Pokémon Egg! The little Pokémon is full of energy and soon charging off...with our heroes and Team Rocket in tow!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: Jessie, James, and Meowth take time to lick their wounds and dream of stealing Pikachu for the glory of Team Rocket. After a chance meeting with a Team Rocket scout, it seems these dreams are blasting off before their eyes!

programme.title: Pokemon: Master Quest
programme.desc: When thick fog interrupts our heroes' journey, a girl and her Ninetales invite them to rest at a nearby mansion...where Brock and their host fall into a romance that could turn out to be ghostly!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to teach Dipsy a nursery rhyme. The Teletubbies watch two children playing with water. It rains in Teletubbyland, and makes a puddle.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: All the Teletubbies pop up to say hello. The Teletubbies see a girl whose mother is a very good singer. Four happy Teletubbies dance around Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for Dipsy and Laa-Laa. The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number two.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.desc: Two girls make a picture of a gold fish pond using tissue paper. Dipsy sees a cloud and decides to follow it. The cloud rains and leaves a puddle.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies sit down to eat some Tubby Custard, but they stop to watch some children buy some different sorts of vegetables. The Teletubbies ask the question – what colour is Tubby Custard?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children perform a Maori Song. In Teletubbyland, Po sings a lovely song. Gradually the other Teletubbies join in, until they sing a lovely song together. The Teletubbies love to sing.

programme.desc: A picture-perfect Canadian couple Karla Homolka and Paul Bernardo join to perform torture and mutilation on young victims - crimes that are virtually unspeakable. Two teenage girls were raped and murdered, and the couple even filmed themselves doing it.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2001, British traveler Peter Falconio is presumed murdered in the Australian outback. Joanne Lees survives the attack, and Bradley John Murdoch is convicted of the murder in 2005. Peter's body is never found.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Murder by the Mob depicts the battle for justice by Peppino Impastato's family after his 1978 death was misclassified. His mother and brother reopened the case, leading to mafia boss Gaetano Badalamenti's 2002 conviction for the murder.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1995 Paris, Guy Georges, a serial killer, was linked to multiple murders through DNA and later confessed in court. He was sentenced to life in prison, leading to the establishment of a DNA database for offenders in France.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Jutta Weber is last seen on August 6, 1997. In August 1999, Don Gazley is arrested and wants to cut a deal: if the police make his charges go away, he’ll tell them where Jutta Weber’s body is. Is Gazley telling the truth?

programme.desc: While Ton soups up their new truck, Allen heads to an auction solo and encounters Carolyn and CJ. There he discovers LARP weaponry, a sword collection, and falconry gear, before Ton reveals their new ride: Betty.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola

programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin and Godwin.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: The Robertsons help a long time employee whose Mom has fallen on hard times by buying her a brand new house for Christmas. Jep, Jase, Martin and Godwin race to finish a deck in time for the big reveal, only to get sidetracked by a hammering competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Cannonball Runs

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Mo Math, Mo Problems

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Coop! There It Is!
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project - renovating the chicken coop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Friday Afternoon Lights
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Master and Duck Commander
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Inlawful Entry

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Rise Of The Machines
programme.desc: If technology goes too far, too fast, a time may come when humans are no longer at the top of the evolutionary food chain.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bigfoot
programme.desc: The evidence for Bigfoot piles up, causing some to wonder who has been keeping information from the public.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the US government's classified and declassified investigations into UFO sightings.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: UFO Zones: Journey to the world's hottest UFO zones, where physical and paranormal phenomenons and unidentified objects and aliens are reported with alarming frequency.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the information obtained from people who have experienced alien abductions.

programme.title: VE Day - Forever in their Debt
programme.desc: Tells the stories of those who experienced the end of the war in all its many forms. It features a wide range of interviews from children who remember the street parties, to the servicemen who remember not having to buy a single drink that day.

programme.title: Anzacs: In The Face Of War
programme.desc: 'ANZACS In the Face of War' presents an historical profile of Australia and new Zealand at the outbreak of war. The legacy of WWI the shared experiences and expectations of WWII.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Dunkirk (September 1, 1939)
programme.desc: To keep France free, 400,000 English soldiers have manned the battlefields. Germany's strength is too great and pushes the British to the coast town of Dunkirk.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of Poland
programme.desc: German tanks roll into Poland in September 1939.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Battle of Norway (Early 1940)
programme.desc: Early in the war, the Germans decide they need to guarantee access to the Norwegian port of Narvik to ensure their supplies of Swedish iron ore. The British, however, send destroyers to up-end the German plan.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Bombing of England (Fall 1940)
programme.desc: After invading France, Hitler is planning to cross the Channel. His only obstacle is the Royal Air Force. Throughout the summer of 1940, both sides lose an incredible number of daring flyers.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Tobruk
programme.desc: German field marshal Erwin Rommel scores a major victory at the Libyan seaport of Tobruk.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: B25: The mighty North American twin delivered the first blow in the fight back against Japan, in one of the most daring and audacious raids of all time.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Close Combat
programme.desc: Weapons experts test the physical and psychological impact of close combat weapons - the Roman short sword, the medieval war hammer and the bayonet.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: A New Cold War
programme.desc: A New Cold War: How will the new Cold War, involving the US, Russia, the UK and China, play out? Will trade and cyber warfare be the worst of it or is military war inevitable?

programme.title: The Sound And The Fury
programme.desc: In the East, Hitler launches Operation Barbarossa and invades the Soviet Union, reaching the outskirts of Moscow. But winter and Soviet resistance break his momentum. The Red Army, boosted by relentless propaganda, put up a fierce fight.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Russian Intervention In Georgia
programme.desc: Russian Intervention in Georgia: In 2008, nearly 850 people are killed in the Russo-Georgian War. How did it erupt and what is the current relationship between the two nations?

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Weapons For All
programme.desc: From the crossbow to the Kalashnikov to 3D-printed firearms, weaponry designed for everyone can offer a decisive advantage in warfare.

programme.desc: Master Mayhem wants to become a master magician, and he’s pulling a bit of mayhem out of thin air. When his tricks begin to backfire, Me-Ouch! takes it upon herself to attack planet Earth and make our Champion disappear.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: The KFDP learns of a MASSIVE CRYSTAL located somewhere in the middle of the desert. Edgar realizes that it’s actually quite a far distance outside of town. The dinos load up their DUV’s and head for an impromptu road trip.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: When an astronaut/scientist discovers an alien embryo in a strange alien pod, he asks the celebrated Dr. Piranoid to come up to the space station to examine it -- not knowing that Piranoid plans to gene-slam Manta-ray DNA with alien DNA.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: A new group of aerial daredevils, the Stunt-Hawks, have arrived for a series of shows in Soaring Heights, which coincides with a string of daring aerial heists throughout the city.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Dueling for Answers
programme.desc: Playmaker battles Zaizen to unlock Sol Tech’s databank and the secrets to his past!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: After a high-speed chase for a crystal, Skor’s run ends in a Chow-style roadbock: AKA a gaint pile of manure. Skor vows to “erase them from history! ” and he isn’t kidding.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Playback
programme.desc: Frog and Pigeon plan an exclusive expose on Playmaker after Ghost Gal supplies them with the goods on Link VRAINS’ newest hero!

programme.title: The Wombles
programme.desc: Competition for the best snowman.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM steals a shrinking ray from the inventor and uses it to steal rare cars from an exhibit.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse finds out he needs to hurry to attend an award ceremony, but the Mark III somehow cops an attitude and refuses to be controlled. Danger Mouse and Penfold spent most of the episode trying to chase the Mark III down.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM follows ancient clues carved into the mountains of South America that will lead them to a treasure.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM devises a cyclonic disrupter to render MASK vehicles useless and then proceeds to rob a reactor of its plutonium.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: London appears to be flooded in water, and its citizens have to crowd up in the top parts of its buildings.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold had to the China seas to look for Professor Squakencluck who, despite having invented an object that can never be lost, ends up dropping the item in a remote island and getting lost himself.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Pink Hi-Tops
programme.desc: Pink Panther thinks he wants a pair of high-tech hi-top sneakers until he puts them on.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: On an archeological dig, Matt and scientists come upon a mysterious gorge where their cars have been crushed.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: While vacationing in Acapulco, Gloria sees the lush land turn into a desert in a matter of hours.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Cowboy Pink': Panther helps Heidi Von Schmarty get her herd of cows to San Francisco, despite cattle rustling attempts by Dogfather. 'Stealth Panther': Panther goes on a secret mission to recover a stolen Stealth aircraft from a group of bad guys.

programme.title: The Wombles
programme.desc: Golf balls sometimes travel in the wrong direction.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 12

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Back/The Ballad Of Buster Baxter
programme.desc: Buster's coming home! The word spreads fast, but so does the fear that Buster will be different. Then, it seems to Buster, not only have his friends changed while he was gone, but they've forgotten all about him! Will he ever fit in again?

programme.title: Arthur: The Last Day (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: It's a time of change at Lakewood Elementary as Arthur and Buster move up to 4th grade. D.W. and Bud prepare to enter kindergarten and Muffy and Francine contemplate how spending the summer away from each other will affect their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur: Bully for Binky/Misfortune Teller
programme.desc: Is Binky Barnes really the most disgusting, nasty, horrible person on the planet, or is he just misunderstood? Next, what's got four sides and the answer to everything? Prunella's cootie catcher!

programme.title: Arthur: All About D.W./Blockheads
programme.desc: When Emily gets the starring role in the preschool play, D.W. is beside herself with jealousy. She should be Little Red Riding Hood, not Tree #2! Then, D.W. and Emily are upset when they get stuck with the blocks at playtime.

programme.title: Arthur: Background Blues/And Now Let's Talk To Some Kids
programme.desc: Wouldn't it be cool to find out that your ancestors were famous frontier explorers? But what if they were just...plain folks? The Magic Toolbox show is coming to Ratburn's class to put the kids on TV!

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Book Battle/On the Buster Scale
programme.desc: Lakewood Elementary has just instituted IRP; a program where kids can earn points (and prizes!) for reading. Then, Buster and Brain never agree on movies. Buster rates every film a 10+, while Brain doesn't seem to like anything.

programme.title: Arthur: Love Notes For Muffy/D.W. Blows The Whistle
programme.desc: When Muffy tries to bribe the judges at the school science fair, Francine and The Brain plot revenge. And D.W., a newly-deputized Junior Safety Officer, has a reputation for being a strict enforcer of the rules--well, OK, a tattle-tale.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella the Packrat/What's in a Name?
programme.desc: Prunella saves everything. Can Arthur help her break her packrat habits in time to put together the display for the school's Earth Day fair? Binky find out that his real name isn't Binky--it's Shelley?!

programme.title: Arthur: Lights, Camera...Opera!/All Worked Up
programme.desc: When Muffy's Dad gives her concert tickets, she couldn't be more excited--until she discovers that she's going to the opera. And Arthur aced five quizzes in a row! But his luck runs out when Mom takes a new job.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Today is the big dance party in the park. Barney tells Baby Bop the story of “The Princess Without a Song to Sing.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller. But Barney shows her that Baby Bop is growing. Barney and his friends help Riff see the dentist is nothing to be afraid of.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop thinks the half-moon is somehow broken, Barney and Friends take an imaginary visit to the moon where Barney eases her concerns.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ sings that he wants to be a rock and roll star. Baby Bop sings that she wants to be a country music star. BJ gets mistaken for the artist who painted a portrait of Barney.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On the Road Again
programme.desc: Barney and his friends have a "wheel good fun" day learning about cars. Barney creates a colorful, kid-size car, the dinos learn about seatbelt safety, and everyone discovers there are many different styles of cars.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A World of Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an "International Fair" on the playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff has many special qualities, but sometimes, his shyness makes it hard for him to meet new friends. It’s a special day in the park as Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Burne assigns April a story reporting on the increase in urban crime. The only problem is that urban crime is decreasing.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sleuth on the Loose
programme.desc: While the Turtles are watching their favorite TV show April interrupts the broadcast with a special bulletin about a break-in at Dynamic Science Labs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rust Never Sleeps
programme.desc: Krang works on an oxidizer rocket with enough power to blast the Technodrome to Earth, but something goes wrong, and instead of thrust, the device grows rust.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Real Snow Job
programme.desc: The Turtles are holidaying in the Alps, as Splinter goes off to a nearby mountain to meditate. April is in an Alpine village with Irma when she notices the ice and snow melting, unusual for this time of year.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Venice on the Half-Shell
programme.desc: Krang decides to use a hydrofluxer device to flood Venice, holding it for ransom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Artless
programme.desc: Two snobbish art-collecting aliens arrive in Florence and begin stealing great works of art.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder to set up a special lens that will focus the sun's rays to create a devastating heat ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Irish Jig Is Up
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder decide to use Ireland as their base for the Technodrome. With a device called the Rainbow Trans-Charmer, the villains intend to turn harmless little creatures like sheep and rabbits into slavering beasts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder's New Sword
programme.desc: In Dimension X Krang is using a long-range scanner and discovers a rare metal buried in a ruined castle in England. The metal turns out to be King Arthur's legendary sword, Excalibur.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Lost Queen of Atlantis
programme.desc: Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop are searching for a valuable energy source in Athens and discover that it is April's new necklace.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Body In The Water
programme.desc: A woman's husband reports her falling overboard into Lake Erie, US, but police suspect foul play. When her body surfaces three weeks on, it's clear this was no boating accident.

programme.desc: The Most Haunted tackle the deserted sprawling Ashwell Prison in this As-Live uncut episode. Feeling isolated and separated the team find themselves confronted by something in the dark.

programme.desc: The Most Haunted team continue to film at Ashwell Prison after being pushed to the limits tempers fray and Yvette is stuck alone, petrified as she is stalked by an unseen force lost in the corridors of the prison and the team scramble to save her

programme.title: Bate Hall Pt 1
programme.desc: Yvette and the MH team travel to the oldest pub in Macclesfield, famous for ghost stories and strange occurrences. Whatever is there makes itself known quickly and violently.

programme.title: Bate Hall Pt 2
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team continue to investigate Macclesfield’s oldest pub and are soon under fire from poltergeist activity. Glen’s scepticism is put fully to the test.

programme.title: Ruthin Pt 1
programme.desc: This old Welsh Castle pushes Yvette’s team of ghost hunters to the limit and at least one of them doesn’t make it to the end…but who? Strange noises and sinister shadows seem to create an atmosphere of foreboding throughout the night.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Goodbye, Mr. Zelinka
programme.desc: Mr. Zelinka is a beloved teacher who is being forced to retire because he's old. Jonathan and Mark know that he would prefer to continue teaching.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Choices
programme.desc: The parents of two Vietnamese children come to America to look for them after a ten-year separation.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Summer Camp
programme.desc: After having been scarred in a fire, an actress becomes a counselor at a summer camp for blind children. The camp is run by Jonathan and Mark's blind friend Frank.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Inner Limits
programme.desc: A young man decides to institutionalize his brother who has been completely paralyzed and speechless for many years, against the wishes of their mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: It's a Dog's Life
programme.desc: Mark believes that God has turned Jonathan into a dog. Meanwhile, he must contend with a runaway kid and the kid's scatterbrained mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Merry Christmas from Grandpa
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Jonathan shows three men what will happen in the future if the Earth continues to be ravaged by pollution. One of the men is an energy official another is a farmer and the third one is the President.

programme.title: Dynasty: Mark
programme.desc: Blake tries to be friends with Adam, but Adam rejects him. Alexis tells Mark that he's still married to Krystle. Mark seeks to get a job as a tennis pro at Fallon's hotel.

programme.title: Dynasty: Kirby
programme.desc: Joseph's daughter, Kirby comes to stay with the Carringtons after breaking up with her fiance in France. Joseph tries to persuade her to go back to him. Mark gets the job at Fallon's hotel. Blake tries to get help from congressman Neal McVane.

programme.title: Dynasty: La Mirage
programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty: Acapulco
programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Locket
programme.desc: The Carrington family is informed that Steven's oil rig exploded. Blake goes to look for him, with an uninvited Alexis. Sammy Jo's father returns to Denver to collect Sammy Jo's share of Steven's inheritance, but Krystle throws him out.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Search
programme.desc: Alexis and Blake continue the search for Steven in Idonesia, but find evidence that Steven might be dead. Blake refuses to believe it, and hires a psychic, Jason Denner, to help. Jeff gets really ill from the paint in his office. Adam rapes Kirby.
